{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/86629938?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/s4nntysec/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/s4nntysec/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/s4nntysec/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/s4nntysec/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/s4nntysec", "id": 86629938, "login": "s4nntysec", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjg2NjI5OTM4", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/s4nntysec/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/s4nntysec/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/s4nntysec/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/s4nntysec/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/s4nntysec/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/s4nntysec", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-7317", "cvss": {"score": 5.0, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:L/A:L"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 5.0, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:L/A:L"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 1.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:H/AT:N/PR:L/UI:N/VC:L/VI:L/VA:L/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N/E:P"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-20", "name": "Improper Input Validation"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-502", "name": "Deserialization of Untrusted Data"}], "description": "# Insecure Deserialization in File Cache

- **Severity:** High 
- **CWE:** CWE-502
- **Location:** `system/src/Grav/Framework/Cache/Adapter/FileCache.php`
- **Sink:** `unserialize($value, ['allowed_classes' => true])`

## Affected version(s)

- **Affected:** `>= 1.7.44` and `<= 1.7.49.5` (verified in current codebase and changelog-covered releases).
- **Fixed:** No upstream fix identified in the reviewed branch at the time of analysis.
- **Notes:** Earlier `1.7.x` releases may also be affected, but were not fully back-traced in this review.

## Notes
`allowed_classes => true` allows object instantiation and does not constrain classes.

## PoC (Primitive Demonstration)

### Preconditions
- Local PHP runtime.
- Goal is to validate the deserialization primitive used in cache retrieval.

### Steps
```bash
php -r '
class CacheWakeup { public function __wakeup(){ file_put_contents("/tmp/grav_filecache_poc.txt", "wakeup"); } }

$payload = serialize(new CacheWakeup());
unserialize($payload, ["allowed_classes" => true]);

echo file_exists("/tmp/grav_filecache_poc.txt") ? "FILECACHE_UNSERIALIZE_TRIGGERED\n" : "FILECACHE_UNSERIALIZE_NOT_TRIGGERED\n";
'
```

### Expected Result
- Output contains: `FILECACHE_UNSERIALIZE_TRIGGERED`.

### Interpretation
This reproduces the same unsafe primitive used by `FileCache::doGet()`:
`unserialize($value, ['allowed_classes' => true])`.
If cache files are attacker-tampered, object magic methods may execute.

## Exploit Preconditions
- Cache file poisoning/tampering capability.

## Recommendation
- Avoid object deserialization in cache payloads.
- Use non-object formats and integrity protection for cache files.



---

## Maintainer note — fix applied (2026-04-24)

Fixed in Grav core on the `2.0` branch: commit [`c66dfeb5f`](https://github.com/getgrav/grav/commit/c66dfeb5f) — will ship in **2.0.0-beta.2**.

**What changed:** `Framework\Cache\Adapter\FileCache` now HMAC-signs every cache payload with `Security::getNonceKey()` on write, and verifies the HMAC on read. Tampered, forged, or pre-upgrade files are treated as cache misses and unlinked instead of being unserialized. The on-disk format is now versioned:

```
v2
<expires>
<key>
<hmac-hex>
<serialized>
```

Existing caches rebuild transparently on first read. Note that `Framework\Cache\Adapter\FileCache` isn't wired into Grav's main cache path — Symfony's `FilesystemAdapter` is — but the class is reachable by plugin and downstream consumers, so the hardening applies defensively.

**Files:**
- [`system/src/Grav/Framework/Cache/Adapter/FileCache.php`](https://github.com/getgrav/grav/blob/2.0/system/src/Grav/Framework/Cache/Adapter/FileCache.php).
- [`tests/unit/Grav/Common/Security/FileCacheSecurityTest.php`](https://github.com/getgrav/grav/blob/2.0/tests/unit/Grav/Common/Security/FileCacheSecurityTest.php) — round-trip, tampered-payload rejection, wrong-key forgery rejection, pre-v2 file rebuild, key-field mismatch.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00224, "percentile": 0.12776}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-gwfr-jfjf-92vv", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-05T21:29:29Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-gwfr-jfjf-92vv", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-gwfr-jfjf-92vv"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-7317"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-05-05T21:29:29Z", "references": ["https://github.com/getgrav/grav/security/advisories/GHSA-gwfr-jfjf-92vv", "https://github.com/getgrav/grav/commit/5a12f9be8314682c8713e569e330f11805d0a663", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-7317", "https://github.com/getgrav/grav/commit/c66dfeb5f", "https://github.com/devsamuelsantiago/grav-cms-filecache-object-injection", "https://vuldb.com/submit/798732", "https://vuldb.com/vuln/359965", "https://vuldb.com/vuln/359965/cti", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-gwfr-jfjf-92vv"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/getgrav/grav/security-advisories/GHSA-gwfr-jfjf-92vv", "severity": "low", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/getgrav/grav", "summary": "Grav has Insecure Deserialization in File Cache", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-08T15:36:38Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-gwfr-jfjf-92vv", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.0.0-beta.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "getgrav/grav"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2.0.0-beta.2"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Grav has Insecure Deserialization in File Cache
